name: MKT · Agency Performance — Sample
sql:
SELECT * FROM (VALUES
  ('Acme Corp', 'Search', 'Google Ads', 12000, 85000, 420000, 18900, 1240),
  ('Acme Corp', 'Display', 'Programmatic', 8500, 41000, 980000, 9800, 510),
  ('Acme Corp', 'Social', 'Meta', 6200, 38000, 750000, 22500, 870),
  ('BlueSky Inc', 'Search', 'Google Ads', 9800, 72000, 510000, 21000, 1050),
  ('BlueSky Inc', 'Video', 'YouTube', 11000, 54000, 1200000, 31000, 640),
  ('BlueSky Inc', 'Social', 'LinkedIn', 7400, 29000, 330000, 8200, 290),
  ('ClearPath', 'Search', 'Google Ads', 14500, 98000, 620000, 27800, 1580),
  ('ClearPath', 'Display', 'Programmatic', 5100, 22000, 870000, 7400, 320),
  ('ClearPath', 'Social', 'Meta', 8900, 61000, 910000, 34100, 990),
  ('Delta Brands', 'Video', 'YouTube', 13200, 77000, 1500000, 42000, 780),
  ('Delta Brands', 'Search', 'Google Ads', 10700, 81000, 490000, 19600, 1120),
  ('Delta Brands', 'Social', 'LinkedIn', 6600, 31000, 280000, 7100, 250)
) AS t(client, campaign_type, channel, spend, revenue, impressions, clicks, conversions)
